name: STLLR Gold Inc.
description: STLLR Gold Inc. (formerly Nighthawk Gold Corp., merged with Moneta Gold in February 2024) is a Canadian gold developer with two cornerstone projects: the Colomac Gold Project in the Indin Lake region of the Northwest Territories and the Tower Gold Project near Timmins, Ontario. The combined entity holds over 2.6 million inferred ounces at Colomac and trades as TSX: STLR.
